channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Russell Brand Says He Had 'Exploitative' Sex with 16-Year-Old Girl When He Was 30
item.description: Brand is currently facing multiple charges of rape and sexual assault in the U.K.

item.title: I Walked 20,000+ Steps Ache-Free in These Adidas Sneakers at Tokyo Disney — Grab a Pair on Sale at Amazon Right Now
item.description: Jessica Alba has worn these exact platform shoes, too

item.title: Mariska Hargitay Says She 'Burst Out in Tears' over Christopher Meloni's “Law & Order: Organized Crime” Cancellation
item.description: 'Law & Order: Organized Crime' was canceled after five seasons on April 16

item.title: Prince Louis Shows Off His Sporty Side in Beachy Birthday Video: '8 Is Great!'
item.description: The young royal played cricket, jumped into the sea and ran fast in the footage filmed during a family vacation in Cornwall

item.title: How Did Hulk Hogan Die? Inside the WWE Star's Quiet Health Struggles at the End of His Life
item.description: Twelve-time world champion wrestler Hulk Hogan died in July 2025

item.title: Influencer Landon McBroom’s Ex Says His GF Lied in Restraining Order Filing
item.description: Shyla Walker says Landon McBroom’s girlfriend spun a wildly exaggerated version of their custody showdown ... and she claims to have the receipts to p...

item.title: Bobbi Althoff Joins 'Secret Lives of Mormon Wives' Orange County Spinoff
item.description: Bobbi Althoff's cringe comedy has propelled her into reality TV ... because she's landed a role on the upcoming 'Secret Lives of Mormon Wives' spinoff...

item.title: Alex Cooper, Husband Reportedly Skip Team Meeting After Behavior Complaints
item.description: Things might be a bit unwell in Alex Cooper's world ... she and her husband, Matt Kaplan, reportedly skipped an all-hands meeting at their company Unw...

item.title: Jada Pinkett Smith Asks Judge to Force Will's Ex-Pal to Cough Up $49K in Court
item.description: Jada Pinkett Smith is asking a court to order Will Smith's former friend to pay the $49K tab from her attorneys ... TMZ has learned. According to cour...

item.title: Kat Graham Says Her 'Michael' Scenes Were Among Those Cut for Legal Reasons
item.description: The Michael Jackson biopic opens tomorrow ... but one cast member told fans this morning, don't expect to see her in the film. Kat Graham was cast as ...
